originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&irq` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE false)
     (= CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN true)
     (= CONFIG_OF_IRQ true))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_TWL4030_CORE () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_IRQ_DOMAIN () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_OF_IRQ () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Line 12: `int irq = *ops` inside irq_domain_add() (compiled when IRQ_DOMAIN=T). irq is assigned but never read — dead store. New bug not in VBDB. Required condition: IRQ_DOMAIN=T. TWL4030=F only means twl_probe() is not compiled (doesn't affect irq_domain_add itself). OF_IRQ=T only determines if ops=NULL or not, not whether irq is dead. Both are unnecessary. PC is over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
